text:
Once upon a time, there was a frog who hopped every morning to a crystal-clear pond. Every day he watched the sun rise, chasing the horizon. The moon would sometimes visit him while he read a good book.

One night, he dreamed that he could swim across oceans and have tea with celebrities. He awoke feeling strangely confident.

The next morning, feeling bold, the frog jumped into the water. His legs wiggled, and suddenly he was gliding through the water like a tiny whale. Birds chirped in delight!

After many graceful days, he realized how lonely he must look from far away. So, with tears in his eyes over his lost dreams, he decided to go home. On the way back, he heard music.

Looking closer, he saw a band practicing a beautiful ballad. Their instruments played the story of his journeys.

As the song reached its climax, the frog leaped into the air—a star falling through twilight. He landed softly beside the singer
